chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1970. Resonant Modification and Destruction of Adiabatic Invariants (M293) by E.F. Jaeger and A.J. Lichtenberg. Computer Evaluation of Modern Operational Amplifiers (M292) by Sing-Yui James Wong. Examples of Algorithm Verification (M291) by W.D. Maurer, L.L. Krishna, D.C. Leong, A. Ling, A. Ong, G. Pritchett, R. Rawson, B. Romberger, A. Rosenthal, J. Serences, C.H. Trent, A.G. Tucker, B. Wong, P. Wong and Wong R. Algorithm Verification (M290) by W.D. Maurer. Tellegen's Theorem and Thermodynamic Inequalities (M289) by G.F. Oster and C.A. Desoer.
chunks.question: What are the first five technical reports from 1970?
chunks.answer: Resonant Modification, Computer Evaluation, Algorithm Verification examples, Algorithm Verification, Tellegen's Theorem.

chunks.text: Some Results On Existence and Uniqueness of Solution of Nonlinear Networks (M288) by T. Fujisawa and E.S. Kuh. A Method of Feasible Directions Using Function Approximations, With Applications to Min Max Problems (M287) by R. Klessig and E. Polak. Piecewise-Linear Theory of Nonlinear Networks (M286) by T. Fujisawa and E.S. Kuh. Canonical Structure in Attribute Based File Organization (M285) by Eugene Wong and T.C. Chiang. The Design Optimization of Integrated Broadband Amplifiers (M284) by Bruce A. Wooley.
chunks.question: Which reports cover nonlinear networks and optimization methods?
chunks.answer: M288, M287, M286, M284 on networks and optimization.

chunks.text: Some Results Concerning Time-Varying Networks Having a Time-Invariant Terminal Behavior (M283) by Ronald A. Skoog. Target Function Approach to Linear Pursuit Problems (M282) by Wladimir Borgest and Pravin Varaiya. Quantitative Fuzzy Semantics (M281) by L.A. Zadeh. On Dynamical Systems Realizing Stationary Weighting Patterns and Time-Varying Feedback Systems (M280) by R.A. Skoog. Efficient Implementations of the Polak-Ribiere Conjugate Gradient Algorithm (M279) by R. Klessig and E. Polak.
chunks.question: What topics do reports M283 to M279 address?
chunks.answer: Time-varying networks, pursuit problems, fuzzy semantics, dynamical systems, conjugate gradient.

chunks.text: Representation of Martingales, Quadratic Variation and Application (M278) by E. Wong. Similarity Relations and Fuzzy Orderings (M277) by L.A. Zadeh. Networks With Very Small and Very Large Parasitics: Natural Frequencies and Stability (M276) by C.A. Desoer and M.J. Shensa. Design of Precompensator for Decoupling Problem (M275) by S.H. Wang. On the Use of Models in the Synthesis of Optimization Algorithms (M274) by E. Polak.
chunks.question: Which reports involve fuzzy logic and network stability?
chunks.answer: M277 on fuzzy orderings, M276 on network stability.

chunks.text: On the Solutions of a Stochastic Control System (M273) by T. Duncan and P. Varaiya. Extensions to Instability Results Given by J.C. Willems (M272) by L.P. Lecoq and A.M. Hopkin. On the Multiple-Input Multiple-Output Discrete Systems (M271) by E.I. Jury, S.M. Ahn and B.W. Lee. On the Perturbational Sensitivity of Solutions to Nonlinear Differential Equations (M270) by M.K. Inan. A Functional Analysis Approach to L∞ Stability and its applications to Systems with Hysteresis (M269) by L.P. Lecoq and A.M. Hopkin.
chunks.question: What are the final five technical reports from 1970?
chunks.answer: Stochastic control, instability extensions, MIMO systems, sensitivity, L∞ stability.
